nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “Behold, a people is coming from the north land, And a great nation will be aroused from the remote parts of the earth.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “Behold, a people is coming from the north country, a great nation is stirring from the farthest parts of the earth.

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說： “看哪！有一個民族從北方之地而來， 有一大國被激動從地極來到。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “看啊，有一个民族从北方来， 有一个强国从地极发动进攻。
